summary: Iteration 43 - Bug Fixes Verification Complete. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend tests verified: 1) Trade streak API returns correct structure with streak count, 2) Floating countdown popup correctly hidden on /trade-monitor, /profile, /admin/* pages, 3) Trade Monitor page loads correctly with 'No active trading signal' message when no signal, 4) Onboarding Tour can be dismissed via Skip Tour button and X button (overlay click also implemented but blocked by API Keys modal in test), 5) Manual adjustment indicator (✎) code implemented in ProfitTrackerPage.jsx, 6) Trade Entered button logic implemented in TradeMonitorPage.jsx.
critical_code_review_comments: Trade streak calculation (server.py lines 1338-1377): Correctly counts consecutive trades where actual_profit > 0 OR performance in ['exceeded', 'perfect', 'target', 'above']
Floating countdown visibility (TradeCountdownContext.jsx lines 103-110): shouldHideFloatingPopup correctly hides on /trade-monitor, /merin, /profile, /admin/* pages
30-second countdown (TradeMonitorPage.jsx lines 706-718): preTradeCountdown shows active countdown only in last 30 seconds
Trade Entered button (TradeMonitorPage.jsx lines 686-700): showExitAlert triggers when diff <= 0 and tradeEnteredRef.current is false
Onboarding Tour dismissal (OnboardingTour.jsx lines 177-179, 202-205): handleSkip saves to localStorage, overlay onClick calls handleSkip
Manual adjustment indicator (ProfitTrackerPage.jsx lines 2194-2198): Shows ✎ badge when tradeLogs[day.dateKey]?.is_manual_adjustment is true
is_manual_adjustment flag (server.py line 1585): Set to True for retroactively logged trades via log-missed-trade endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 user-reported bugs have been verified as fixed: 1) Trade streak counts consecutive positive profit trades, 2) Floating countdown hidden on merin/admin/profile pages, 3) Simplified 30-second countdown implemented, 4) Trade Entered button appears when countdown reaches zero, 5) Onboarding Tour dismissible via Skip/X/overlay, 6) Manual adjustment indicator (✎) shows for retroactively logged trades. Currently no active trading signal, so countdown/Trade Entered button tests were code-verified rather than live-tested.

trade_streak_api.details: GET /api/trade/streak returns correct structure with streak, streak_type, total_trades. Streak counts consecutive trades with actual_profit > 0 or performance in success categories.

floating_countdown_visibility.details: Floating countdown NOT visible on /trade-monitor (main timer there), /profile, /admin/members, /admin/signals. Would show on /dashboard if active countdown.

simplified_30_second_countdown.details: TradeMonitorPage.jsx lines 706-718: preTradeCountdown shows only in last 30 seconds. Beeps every 5 seconds, more frequent in last 5 seconds.

trade_entered_button.details: TradeMonitorPage.jsx lines 686-700: showExitAlert triggers when countdown reaches zero. Button appears with 'Trade Entered' text.

onboarding_tour_dismissal.details: Tour dismissed via Skip Tour button (localStorage set to 'true'), X button works, overlay onClick calls handleSkip.

manual_adjustment_indicator.details: ProfitTrackerPage.jsx lines 2194-2198: Shows ✎ badge for trades with is_manual_adjustment=true. Backend sets flag in log-missed-trade endpoint.

trade_monitor_no_signal.details: Trade Monitor page loads correctly with 'No active trading signal' message, LOT Size card, Projected Exit Value, Trade Control card, streak indicator.

api_tests.GET /api/trade/streak: PASS - Returns streak count and type
api_tests.GET /api/trade/active-signal: PASS - Returns null signal when no active signal
api_tests.GET /api/profit/summary: PASS - Returns account value and profit data

ui_tests.dashboard_load: PASS - Dashboard loads with all KPI cards
ui_tests.trade_monitor_load: PASS - Trade Monitor loads with no signal message
ui_tests.profit_tracker_load: PASS - Profit Tracker loads with all cards
ui_tests.onboarding_tour_skip: PASS - Skip Tour button dismisses tour
ui_tests.floating_countdown_hidden: PASS - Hidden on trade-monitor, profile, admin pages

streak_calculation.notes: Counts consecutive trades with actual_profit > 0 OR performance in ['exceeded', 'perfect', 'target', 'above']

simplified_countdown.notes: preTradeCountdown shows only when diff <= 30000 (30 seconds)

trade_entered_button.notes: showExitAlert set to true when diff <= 0 and !tradeEnteredRef.current

onboarding_tour_dismissal.notes: handleSkip calls onClose, overlay onClick calls handleSkip

is_manual_adjustment_flag.notes: Set to True in log-missed-trade endpoint for retroactively logged trades
